div1.entryFree:
Merchandize, subst. 1) goods bought or sold in trade, wares: Mids. II, 1, 134. Merch. I, 1, 40. H5 IV, 1, 155. Rom. II, 2, 84. Having the verb in the singular: my m. makes me not sad, Merch. I, 1, 45. in the plural: the m. are all too dear for me, Ant. II, 5, 104.
2) trade, commerce: were he out of Venice, I can make what m. I will, Merch. III, 1, 134.
